description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, integration, and publish. In the build stage add a build-deb job that uses the nlknguyen/alpine-shellcheck image with entrypoint /bin/sh -c, runs before_script "apk update && apk add openssl make dpkg ca-certificates gnupg tar" and "update-ca-certificates", then executes "make deb". In the integration stage add a kitchen-test-job that uses ruby:2.4-alpine, runs before_script "apk update && apk add coreutils curl build-base openssh-client jq rsync", then runs "make kitchen". In the publish stage add a publish job that uses alpine:latest, runs before_script "apk update && apk add make curl", then runs "make publish", and is limited to the master branch. Define variables BUNDLE_PATH, DEBIAN_FRONTEND, DIGITALOCEAN_TESTBOX_FQDN, KITCHEN_YAML as shown and configure a cache for $BUNDLE_PATH and $CI_PROJECT_DIR/data/.
